notes: Free admission for up to 4. Not valid with school/group visits, Aquarium programs, Simons Theatre tickets, or combination tickets.
raw: This coupon allows free admission to the New England Aquarium for up to 4 people. Library coupons may not be used in conjunction with school or group visits, nor be applied toward Aquarium programs, Simons Theatre tickets, or combination tickets. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
